INNER JOIN "Currencies" AS "c" ON "e"."FromCurrencyId" = "c"."Id"
INNER JOIN "Currencies" AS "c0" ON "e"."ToCurrencyId" = "c0"."Id"
WHERE "e"."IsActive"
ORDER BY "c"."Code", "c0"."Code"
